title: Visit Tripoli
subtitle: Tourism platform for Tripoli, Lebanon
description: A full-stack tourism platform with a Flutter mobile app and React web app sharing the same NOSQL/MongoDB database. Features places, tours, events, user auth, profiles, and trips — with production-ready backend security, rate limiting, and connection pooling.

title: SportBootsPro
subtitle: Lebanon's premier sportswear marketplace
description: A comprehensive e-commerce platform featuring secure payments, inventory management, and user-friendly shopping experience.

title: Children Album
subtitle: Digital platform for childhood memories
description: A heartwarming platform for families to preserve and organize childhood memories with photo management.

title: FitSync
subtitle: Fitness tracking application
description: A fitness mobile application that helps users track workouts, set goals, and monitor progress.

title: Ghafour Ice Cream
subtitle: Full-stack ice cream shop web app
description: A full-stack e-commerce web application for an ice cream shop, featuring a product catalog, ordering system, and admin dashboard — built with a React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, and MongoDB database.
